core_pain_point: Appointments and transport status are not synchronized
impact_emotional: High stress for caregivers and riders
current_workaround: Calls dispatch and reorders stops manually
quote_1: If one appointment runs long, it throws off the whole day.
quote_2: If they had a way to see ETA, it would save everyone time.
adoption_conditions: Needs simple real-time visibility and alerts

care_context: Dialysis-dependent care with repeated transport disruptions
transport_context: Personal transportation instability affecting dialysis attendance
core_pain_point: Transportation breakdowns repeatedly disrupt life-sustaining treatment access
impact_logistical: Missed or threatened attendance to time-bound treatment windows
impact_medical: Elevated risk of fluid overload and hospitalization when dialysis is missed
impact_emotional: High stress and vulnerability due to no dependable backup
impact_financial: Potential emergency and downstream care costs
current_workaround: Tries to self-manage and reschedule without reliable backup
quote_1: Car has broke down a few times.
adoption_conditions: Needs dependable backup coordination for critical treatment days
top_feature_requested: Reliability alerts and backup transport coordination

transport_context: Insurance transportation with repeated cancelations and no-shows
core_pain_point: Insurance transportation canceled ride without reliable notice causing missed care
impact_logistical: Missed scheduled visits and forced same-day status chasing
impact_medical: Missed heart appointment and surgery timing window
impact_emotional: Frustration and reduced trust in transport process
impact_financial: Potential added costs from rescheduling and disruption
current_workaround: Manually checks ride status and attempts to re-coordinate
quote_1: I've actually had to miss my heart appointment and surgery this week because my insurance transportation canceled my ride at 2am.
quote_2: They didn't even show up, or notify me.
adoption_conditions: Needs reliable alerts and backup options for critical visits
top_feature_requested: Real-time cancelation alerts and backup coordination
top_objection_or_risk: Limited provider choice under insurance constraints
next_step_commitment: Open to follow-up and additional feedback
